Notes: CNR wins the 15th Annual Dr. Betty Shabazz Women's Basketball Tournament
All Tourney Team- MVP Jasmine Brandon and Jah-Leah Ellis- CNR, Julia Owen-YU
Anna Bryce- Pratt and Imani Mason- MEC
Game.Officials: Reggie Fowler,  Robert Moccia,  Bob Monahan
